sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Northern Technologies (NTIC) Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: This article provides an earnings transcript for Northern Technologies International Corporation (NTIC), highlighting recent positive financial performance. NTIC reported a Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.01 and revenues of $21.99 million, a 15.3% year-over-year increase, driven by strong ZERUST® sales in industrial and oil & gas sectors, and expansion in China. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for NTIC, forecasting a stock price increase.

feed.title: Northpointe Bancshares declares $0.025 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Northpointe Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: NPB) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.025 per common share, payable on May 4, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 15, 2026. This brings the annual dividend to $0.10 per share, representing a dividend yield of 0.56%. The company, which provides home loans and retail banking products, has seen its stock gain 38.88% over the past year, though an InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be overvalued.

feed.title: National Bankshares Announces Routine Board Size Reduction
feed.summary: National Bankshares (NKSH) announced a reduction in its Board of Directors' size from thirteen to twelve, effective May 13, 2026. This change is due to the upcoming retirement of director Charles E. Green, III, who will not seek re-election at the 2026 Annual Meeting because of age-limit rules. The company emphasized that Green's departure is not related to any disagreements regarding company operations or policies, indicating a routine governance transition.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Names Jennifer Lawless to Lead Learning and Development, Supporting Ongoing Cultural Transformation
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. has appointed Jennifer Lawless as Vice President, Enterprise Learning to lead its learning and development strategy. In this new role, Lawless will focus on building an agile workforce, enhancing leadership capabilities, and fostering a culture of accountability, safety, and innovation. Her extensive background at Exelon Utilities aligns with FirstEnergy's goal of continuous performance improvement and cultural transformation.

feed.title: Reltio Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Master Data Management Solutions
feed.summary: Reltio has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Master Data Management Solutions, also being positioned furthest for Completeness of Vision. The company's Reltio Data Cloud, a cloud-native, multidomain MDM platform, is highlighted for its ability to unify trusted data across operational, analytical, and AI use cases. Reltio credits this recognition to its commitment to context intelligence, flexible data models, real-time access, and broader enterprise interoperability.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Names Brian Harrell to Lead Enterprise Security
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. has appointed Brian Harrell as Vice President and Chief Security Officer to strengthen its enterprise security posture against cyber and physical threats. Harrell, a former senior U.S. homeland security official, will focus on enhancing defenses, expanding intelligence-driven capabilities, and integrating security into business operations. His role will cover corporate and field security, cybersecurity, threat intelligence, and risk and compliance, emphasizing training and coordination.

feed.title: F5, AppLovin, Flywire, Commvault, and Freshworks Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of F5, AppLovin, Flywire, Commvault, and Freshworks experienced declines due to increased market volatility following reports of a ceasefire breach in the Middle East. The launch of Anthropic's 'Managed Agents' also contributed to the sell-off, raising concerns about disruption to the traditional SaaS model. A deleted social media post by short seller Michael Burry, claiming Anthropic was "eating Palantir’s lunch," further intensified fears about the vulnerability of legacy platforms.

feed.title: Delta, CVG's top airline, expects $2B hit due to rising fuel costs
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is anticipating a $2 billion increase in jet fuel costs through June. This significant financial hit is attributed to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which has driven fuel prices higher. The airline, a top carrier at Cincinnati/Northern Kentucky International Airport (CVG), will absorb these rising expenses.

feed.title: Paychex Stock Hits 1-Year Low Amid Analyst Caution
feed.summary: Paychex (NASDAQ:PAYX) stock recently hit a new 52-week low as analysts expressed caution about the company's short-term growth trajectory. While some analysts have raised longer-term earnings estimates, firms like Zacks Investment Research and TD Cowen have trimmed near-term forecasts and price targets, citing economic uncertainty. The stock's performance is seen as an indicator of economic conditions for small and medium-sized businesses, and investors are watching for further updates amid these headwinds.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Inc Stock (TXN) Moved Up by 3.07% on Apr 9: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) stock rose 3.07% on April 9th, driven by Stifel's upgrade to "Buy" and a raised price target due to the company's strong position in the analog semiconductor cycle. The upgrade highlights Texas Instruments' potential to gain market share, supported by strategic acquisitions, growth in AI data centers, and internal 300mm wafer manufacturing. The positive outlook is further bolstered by optimistic industry forecasts for semiconductor revenue growth, especially in AI processing and data center networking, and increased institutional investment.

feed.title: Adobe Inc Stock (ADBE) Moved Down by 4.19% on Apr 9: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Adobe Inc (ADBE) stock declined by 4.19% on April 9 due to a combination of factors including intensified competition from rivals like Figma and Canva, the planned retirement of CEO Shantanu Narayen, and a significant stake reduction by institutional investor Addenda Capital Inc. Analyst downgrades, concerns over pricing power, and a cautious broader market also contributed to the negative movement. The stock's technical indicators suggest a neutral to oversold condition.

feed.title: What's Going On With Ford Stock Today?
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company (NYSE: F) is partnering with Sharrow Engineering to significantly reduce production timelines for the Sharrow Propeller, aiming to boost production from 130 days to two weeks using advanced 3D sand-casting. Despite this strategic move and a 27.68% gain over 12 months, Ford's stock is currently underperforming within the Consumer Discretionary sector. Analysts hold a consensus Hold rating with a price target of $13.29, and Ford is expected to report Q1 earnings on April 29th.

feed.title: NextEra Energy Hits New 52-Week High
feed.summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) has reached a new 52-week high of $96.21 per share, driven by its expanding renewable energy portfolio and strong financial results. This performance signals a positive trend for the renewable energy sector, with increasing investor interest and demand for clean energy solutions. Analysts remain bullish on the stock, with a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $94.94.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals Hits New 12-Month High
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE: APD) reached a new 52-week high, with its stock trading as high as $301.25 before closing at $298.73. This strong performance is attributed to recent analyst upgrades, increased price targets, and better-than-expected quarterly earnings. Investor confidence in the company's business model and future growth prospects is high despite broader economic uncertainties.

feed.title: National Bankshares amends bylaws to reduce board size following director retirement
feed.summary: National Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ:NKSH) has amended its bylaws to reduce the number of directors on its board from thirteen to twelve, effective May 13, 2026. This change follows the upcoming retirement of director Charles E. Green, III, who will not seek re-election due to age limit provisions. Separately, Paul M. Mylum, Executive Vice President and Chief Lending Officer, will resign on May 15, 2026, to become president of The Bank of Charlotte County.

feed.title: Nvent Electric stock hits all-time high at 129.98 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Nvent Electric PLC's stock reached an all-time high of $129.98, currently trading near its 52-week peak after a 162.31% appreciation in the last year, reflecting strong investor confidence despite being deemed overvalued by InvestingPro. The company recently announced new three-year financial targets, including significant organic sales and adjusted EPS growth, driven by strong demand in the data center sector, leading to positive analyst revisions and price target increases from Wolfe Research, RBC Capital, and UBS.

feed.title: Enviri Corp stock hits 52-week high at 19.97 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Enviri Corp's stock has reached a 52-week high of $19.97, marking a 243% increase over the past year and a 66.5% gain in six months, driven by strong investor confidence. Despite this performance, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is overvalued and carries a high beta of 1.72, indicating volatility. The company recently surpassed Q4 2025 earnings expectations and is moving forward with the sale of Clean Earth for $3 billion, with Lake Street raising its price target to $25.00.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace to Announce Q1 2026 Results - Today in Pittsburgh
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. will announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 9, 2026, and host a webcast to discuss its performance. As a major player, the company's earnings offer key insights into the aerospace industry's health and outlook for investors and analysts. The webcast will provide details for its advanced engineered products for various markets.

feed.title: Energy Vault Expands into Japan with 850 MW Energy Storage Portfolio Acquisition
feed.summary: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. has formally entered the Japanese market by acquiring an 850 MW Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project pipeline from a local developer. This strategic move includes integrating a team of local energy experts, positioning Energy Vault to capitalize on Japan's rapidly growing energy storage sector. The acquisition aims to support Japan's renewable energy transition and carbon-neutral goals by providing flexible and reliable grid solutions.

feed.title: Resmed CEO Farrell sells $1.12 million in stock
feed.summary: ResMed (NASDAQ:RMD) Chairman and CEO Michael J. Farrell sold 4,991 shares of company stock for $1.12 million on April 7, 2026. This transaction occurred after he exercised options to acquire the same number of shares for $730,382. Following the sale, Farrell directly owns 466,223 shares of ResMed, with an additional 2,090 shares held indirectly through a family trust.

feed.title: $NIO Inc (NIO.US)$ Swing trade profit for today[Cool Guy][Dollar]
feed.summary: This post features a user named "Deep Sea" sharing their swing trade profit for NIO Inc (NIO.US) on the moomoo community platform. The content is very brief, serving as a social media-style update rather than an in-depth analysis. The post includes disclaimers from Moomoo Technologies Inc. about the educational purpose of the community and risks associated with investing.

feed.title: Everest Group (EG): Wells Fargo Lowers Price Target to $304 | EG Stock News
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Elyse Greenspan has lowered the price target for Everest Group (EG) from $310.00 to $304.00, maintaining an Equal-Weight rating. This adjustment reflects a -1.94% change and comes amidst other analysts' fluctuating price targets for the Bermuda-based reinsurance and insurance organization. Despite the reduced target, the average one-year price target from 16 analysts is $363.25, suggesting an 8.87% upside from the current price.

feed.title: The Week's MPN Video Podcast: Apple Isn’t Slowing Down Plus F1’s Billion-Dollar Boom and Dune vs Avengers
feed.summary: This MPN Video Podcast with David Bloom and Daniel Frankel discusses Apple's continued dominance in the U.S. smartphone market, the rapid growth of Formula 1 as a media property, and the potential for a Dune vs. Avengers box office battle. The podcast also touches upon tech culture, studio franchises, and streaming economics.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Upgraded to Buy at Stifel Nicolaus
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus has upgraded Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) from a "hold" to a "buy" rating, increasing its price target to $250, signaling a potential 20% upside. This upgrade reflects growing Wall Street confidence in the semiconductor company's strong product portfolio, market position, and positive business outlook. Investors will be watching if the stock can reach this new target.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Hits New 52-Week High
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE:CNP) has reached a new 52-week high of $44.41, signaling strong investor confidence despite mixed analyst opinions. While JPMorgan Chase & Co. maintained a 'Neutral' rating and lowered its price target, KeyCorp issued an 'Overweight' rating and increased its target, reflecting varied perceptions of the company's future growth potential. Investors are advised to carefully evaluate the company's fundamentals before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Kimco Realty® Invites You to Join Its First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Kimco Realty (NYSE: KIM) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on Thursday, April 30, 2026, before the market open. The company invites investors to its earnings conference call and live webcast at 8:30 AM ET on the same day. Audio from the call will be available on Kimco Realty’s investor relations website until August 1, 2026.

feed.title: Pfizer Invites Shareholders to Virtual 2026 Annual Meeting
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. has announced it will host its 2026 Annual Shareholder Meeting virtually on April 23, 2026, allowing shareholders to participate and vote online. This decision reflects a broader corporate trend towards digital-first annual meetings to enhance accessibility and reduce costs associated with in-person events. Shareholders will receive detailed instructions on how to access the platform and engage with the leadership team.

feed.title: Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz Encourages Medpace Holdings, Inc. (MEDP) Shareholders To Inquire About Securities Fraud Class Action
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz has filed a class action lawsuit against Medpace Holdings, Inc. (MEDP) on behalf of shareholders who purchased stock between April 22, 2025, and February 9, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Medpace made false and misleading statements about its book-to-bill ratio and operational prospects, which led to a significant stock price drop following the release of its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results. Shareholders who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm by June 5, 2026, to discuss their legal rights and participate in the lawsuit.

feed.title: Amazon Plays Both Sides: Chip Competition Leads To Team-Ups - Amazon.com (NASDAQ:AMZN)
feed.summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) CEO Matt Garman stated that Amazon balances competition and collaboration with chip suppliers like Nvidia, AMD, and Intel, emphasizing AWS's role as a major customer offering diverse hardware options. Garman highlighted AWS's multi-model AI ecosystem, investments in companies like Anthropic, and the use of custom chips like Trainium and Graviton. Analysts from JPMorgan and Bank of America Securities maintained "Overweight" and "Buy" ratings respectively, forecasting strong AWS growth driven by AI demand and strategic investments, despite some near-term cost pressures.

feed.title: Applied Materials stock hits all-time high of 396.02 USD
feed.summary: Applied Materials stock has reached an all-time high of $396.02, reflecting a significant 186.1% increase over the past year due to its strong performance in the semiconductor industry. While the stock is considered overvalued by InvestingPro analysis, 25 analysts have revised earnings upwards, reinforcing positive sentiment. The company recently unveiled new chipmaking systems and increased its quarterly dividend, highlighting its strategic advancements and innovation.

feed.title: Northfield Bancorp funds Triple Play Wellness Program to enhance youth activity
feed.summary: Northfield Bancorp, through its Northfield Bank Foundation, has provided a grant to the Boys & Girls Clubs of Union County to support their Triple Play Wellness Program. This initiative aims to foster physical activity and promote healthier habits among children. The grant highlights Northfield Bancorp's commitment to corporate social responsibility and community health.

feed.title: Home Depot CFO Warns Demand Softening, Housing “Frozen” as Big-Ticket Projects Stall at JPM Forum
feed.summary: Home Depot's CFO Richard McPhail reported softening demand in home improvement through 2025 due to consumer uncertainty, inflation, and job loss fears, despite five consecutive quarters of positive comparable sales in the U.S. He noted that the housing market remains "frozen" with historically low existing home sales due to affordability pressures from rising mortgage rates. The company is focusing on deepening penetration with professional customers, expanding its addressable market, and leveraging AI for improved efficiency and customer service, expecting to outperform the market in 2026.

feed.title: Why Locals Say This Costco Location Is A Nightmare To Visit
feed.summary: The Costco location in Issaquah, Washington, near the company's corporate headquarters, is considered a "nightmare" by many locals due to large crowds, poor customer service, and an abundance of "entitled shoppers." Despite these drawbacks, some customers acknowledge that its high demand ensures fresh stock and introduces new items, making it a sort of corporate test market.

feed.title: Yousif Capital Reduces Stake in C.H. Robinson Worldwide
feed.summary: Yousif Capital Management LLC decreased its stake in C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. by 9.3% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling 7,359 shares and retaining approximately 71,954 shares valued at $12.6 million. This transaction highlights institutional investor sentiment towards the transportation and logistics sector, potentially signaling broader economic or industry-specific concerns for the major freight and logistics company.

feed.title: Berger Montague PC Investigating Potential Claims on Behalf of Investors in Northern Dynasty Minerals Ltd. (NYSE: NAK)
feed.summary: Berger Montague PC has initiated an investigation into potential claims against Northern Dynasty Minerals Ltd. (NYSE: NAK) on behalf of its investors. This investigation follows a significant drop in Northern Dynasty's stock price after the U.S. Department of Justice supported the EPA's veto of the company's proposed Pebble Mine project in Alaska. The law firm is examining whether the company or its senior management violated federal securities laws or engaged in other unlawful conduct.

feed.title: “No End To The Greed”: Southwest Airlines Passengers Question New Bag Fees
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines recently increased its checked bag fees by $10, aligning with other major airlines like United and JetBlue. Passengers are expressing frustration, arguing that higher oil prices should already be reflected in ticket costs and questioning whether these new surcharges will be temporary. While some defend the airline's decision due to rising fuel costs not fully covered by fares, many view it as corporate greed and doubt the fees will ever decrease.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Corp stock: Why FICO's scoring power draws long-term investor eyes
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corp (FICO) is a leader in predictive analytics for financial institutions, with its FICO Scores used by over 90% of top US lenders. The company's business model, split between Scores and Software segments, provides stable revenue and global reach, while its heavy investment in AI keeps it ahead of competitors. FICO offers investors a durable play on the digitization of finance, benefiting from network effects, increasing demand for fraud detection, and regulatory pressures for better risk assessment, despite facing competition and macro risks.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages Northann Corp. Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation – NCL
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has initiated an investigation into potential securities claims against Northann Corp. (NYSE American: NCL) due to allegations that the company may have provided materially misleading business information to investors. Shareholders who purchased Northann securities are encouraged to contact the firm to inquire about joining a prospective class action lawsuit aimed at recovering investor losses. The firm emphasizes its track record in securities class actions and invites affected investors to seek counsel.

feed.title: Tommy Fleetwood Blackstone sponsorship, explained: Golfer becomes first global brand ambassador for investment company
feed.summary: Golfer Tommy Fleetwood has secured a sponsorship deal with Blackstone, the world's largest investment manager, becoming their first global brand ambassador. This partnership comes after Fleetwood's apparel contract with Nike expired, leaving him without a sponsor for much of the 2026 season. His cap will now feature Blackstone's logo, reflecting what both parties describe as a shared commitment to disciplined performance and high ethical standards, despite Blackstone's controversial history.

feed.title: The first 10 minutes of rain can turn roads especially slippery
feed.summary: Mercury Insurance has issued a warning to drivers about the increased crash risk during spring rain, noting that nearly 1.2 million crashes annually occur on wet pavement, constituting about 75% of weather-related collisions. The company emphasizes that the first 10-15 minutes of rain are particularly hazardous due to oil and debris making roads slippery. Drivers are urged to adopt safer habits such as slowing down, increasing following distance, and checking tire conditions to mitigate these risks.

feed.title: Nebius vs. CoreWeave: Accelerating Growth vs. Massive Scale in Revenue
feed.summary: This article compares Nebius Group N.V. and CoreWeave, Inc. Class A Common Stock, two "neocloud" companies providing AI workload infrastructure. While CoreWeave has significantly higher revenue and market capitalization, Nebius is growing at a faster percentage rate. Investors are presented with a choice between CoreWeave's high revenue and heavy obligations versus Nebius's rapid growth but higher price-to-sales ratio and smaller revenue base.

feed.title: Hasbro Inc stock: Why toy giant's playbook matters for investors now
feed.summary: Hasbro Inc (HAS) blends timeless toy brands with digital innovation, offering a resilient investment in the consumer spending sector. The company leverages its extensive intellectual property (IP) through categories like toys, games, and entertainment, driving revenue from both physical products and digital licensing. Investors should watch Hasbro's strategic shifts in IP monetization for entertainment, portfolio optimization, and digital transformation, as well as upcoming Q1 earnings for signs of continued growth amidst market uncertainties and competitive pressures.

feed.title: State Street Corp stock hits all-time high at 137.05 USD
feed.summary: State Street Corp's stock has reached an all-time high of $137.05, demonstrating strong investor confidence and robust market performance. The company has a market capitalization of $38.14 billion, a P/E ratio of 14.48, and offers a dividend yield of 2.47%, having maintained dividend payments for 56 consecutive years. Recent strategic moves include expanding its relationship with Thornburg Investment Management for ETF servicing, appointing C. Jack Read as Global Controller, and electing Susan Gordon as an independent director to its board.

feed.title: Amazon.Com Inc., Caterpillar Share Gains Contribute To Dow's 125-Point Climb
feed.summary: Amazon.Com Inc. and Caterpillar are among the companies whose stock gains are contributing to a 125-point rise in the Dow Jones Industrial Average. Separately, Unity Software reported a 35% year-over-year increase in fourth-quarter revenue to $609 million, surpassing analyst estimates, despite posting a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share. This financial news highlights key movers in the stock market and a company's recent earnings performance.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuit Against Enphase Energy, Inc. - ENPH
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is reminding investors that they have until April 20, 2026, to file lead plaintiff applications in a securities class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase and its executives failed to disclose material information between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, regarding the company's ability to manage inventory and offset impacts from the Residential Clean Energy Credit, leading to overstated financial and operational prospects. Investors who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 during the specified Class Period are encouraged to contact ClaimsFiler or Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC for legal options.

feed.title: Sysco Corp. acquires Jetro Restaurant Depot
feed.summary: Sysco Corp. has agreed to acquire Jetro Restaurant Depot for $29.1 billion, aiming to expand its reach and leverage its supply chain capabilities. The deal, expected to close by Q3 2027, will be funded by a mix of new debt, hybrid debt, and cash, with Jetro Restaurant Depot receiving Sysco shares. This acquisition follows a past attempt by Sysco to acquire US Foods, which was blocked by antitrust concerns.

feed.title: Oxford BioTherapeutics Partners with Bristol Myers Squibb for Next-Gen T-Cell Therapies
feed.summary: Oxford BioTherapeutics (OBT) has entered a multi-year strategic collaboration with Bristol Myers Squibb (BMS) to discover and develop next-generation T-cell engager therapies for solid tumors. OBT will use its OGAP®-Verify platform to identify targets and generate molecules, while BMS will handle subsequent research, development, and commercialization. This partnership aims to accelerate the advancement of novel cancer treatments, with OBT receiving an upfront payment, milestone payments, and royalties.

feed.title: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) Sets New 12-Month High - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) has reached a new 52-week high of $76.21, currently trading at $76.099 with a market capitalization of $29.3 billion and a P/E ratio of 6.58. The company significantly surpassed quarterly earnings expectations and provided strong FY2026 and FY2027 guidance. Despite a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with a target price below its current level, the stock offers a 4.6% dividend yield, and institutional ownership stands at approximately 89%.

feed.title: Net income from continuing operations of Northern Trust Corporation – NASDAQ:NTRS
feed.summary: This article provides financial data for Northern Trust Corporation (NTRS) focusing on its net income from continuing operations. It highlights the period value, change, and change percentage, within the context of the Nasdaq Stock Market. The information is sourced from ICE Data Services and FactSet Research Systems Inc.

feed.title: Apollo Global Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuit Against Apollo Global Management, Inc. - APO
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is reminding investors of Apollo Global Management (NYSE: APO) with losses over $100,000 that they have until May 1, 2026, to file as lead plaintiff in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global and its executives failed to disclose material information regarding communications between leadership figures and Jeffrey Epstein, making their statements about the company's business and prospects false and misleading. Affected investors are encouraged to visit ClaimsFiler's website or call for legal options.
